content.summary: do the right thing anon! SemiAnalysis (@SemiAnalysis_) CLAUDE OPUS 5 ALERT: I was walking around San Francisco Hayes Valley today and saw an sidewalk this USB key saying it contains the opus 5 weights. Should i plug it into my computer & upload the weights to huggingface or should I give this USB key to @jekbradbury @aj_kourabi in case it is their USB? — https://nitter.net/SemiAnalysis_/status/2036548649728053498#m
